overall.description: A smooth camera movement through a baseball stadium in GTA V, traveling from the field edge across the infield toward the pitcher's mound and center field scoreboard on a bright sunny day. The empty stadium features distinctive architecture including a large scoreboard and Coca-Cola bottle advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: baseball stadium warning track along outfield edge

events.description: camera turns to face center field and begins moving toward the pitcher's mound

agents.ego_description: moving along the edge of the baseball field near the stands, observing the empty stadium architecture

entered.detail: rows of empty blue stadium seats rising up from the field level
stadium infrastructure ramp with metal railings leading up to seating sections
well-maintained green grass of the baseball outfield
reddish-brown dirt track separating the grass from the stadium wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the edge of an empty baseball stadium, showing the tiered seating sections on the left and the green outfield grass on the right. The concrete infrastructure of the stadium is visible as the camera progresses along the warning track.

scene_state.functional_zone: baseball infield approaching pitcher's mound and center field

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the infield dirt toward the pitcher's mound and the large center field scoreboard

entered.detail: large rectangular scoreboard structure with twin towers displaying advertisements and the year 2013
giant Coca-Cola bottle advertisement structure visible beyond the left field seats
raised circular dirt mound with team logo in the center of the infield

segments.scene_description: The camera continues across the infield toward the pitcher's mound, with the massive center field scoreboard and distinctive Coca-Cola bottle structure dominating the view ahead. The pitcher's mound grows larger as the camera approaches, passing over the reddish infield dirt on a clear sunny day.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that travels from the perimeter of an empty baseball stadium toward the heart of the infield. It begins by gliding along the edge of the field, passing between the tiered seating sections on the left and the green outfield grass on the right. As the camera progresses along the concrete infrastructure of the warning track, the view opens up to reveal the expansive infield. The scene then shifts across the reddish dirt toward the pitcher's mound, which grows larger in the frame as the camera advances. Finally, the movement culminates with the massive center field scoreboard and a distinctive Coca-Cola bottle structure dominating the horizon under a clear sunny sky.
